title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
